content: SoftCRM: modular monolith, 10 bounded contexts. pnpm+Turborepo. API: Express5+Prisma6+PG16+Redis7+BullMQ. Web: React19+Vite+TanStack+Zustand+Tailwind4+Radix. Mobile: RN+Expo. Multi-tenant RLS. JWT auth. 9 PG schemas. Each module: routes/service/repo/validators/types/events/listeners.

Mega-enhancement: 105 tasks, 11 phases, 7 new modules (HR, Manufacturing, Warehouse, Procurement, POS, Assets, Quality), enhanced existing 10 modules, glassmorphism UI overhaul with 20+ new components, ~81 new Prisma models, ~210 new files. Dual POS (retail+restaurant), offline IndexedDB, multi-company accounting, bank feeds, payroll, MRP.
